hero_desc: A game & chill community for all. VRChat based, but all gamers welcome. Join us for bars, clubs, move/game nights, and unique experiences.
about_mission_desc: Raindrops is more than just a VRChat group; it's a sanctuary for gamers and social butterflies alike. We aim to create high-quality, atmospheric events that bring people together.
about_what_desc: From weekly karaoke showdowns to late-night clubbing and cozy movie nights, we host a variety of events designed to foster friendships and unforgettable memories.
event1_desc: Show off your talent or cheer on friends at our custom karaoke lounge.
event2_desc: The premier Raindrops nightlife experience with live DJs and visuals.
event3_desc: Themed parties, movie marathons, and community-driven events.
rules_group1_list:
Verified instances: Clothing optional
Normal instances are strictly SFW
Common sense and consent are mandatory
No threats, doxing, or crasher avatars
Drop portals outside the instance
rules_group2_list:
Be yourself—if you're chill, we're chill
No drama, bad vibes, or rumor spreading
Zero tolerance for ads or promotions
Don't be a troll, just have a good time
Keep your two cents; nobody asked
